creator: dkelly@nebula.tbe.com
text:
netscape4-communicator/files/netscape.sh says:
...
exec $MOZILLA_HOME/communicator-4.06.bin $*

should say:
exec $MOZILLA_HOME/communicator-4.07.bin $*
                                   ^----

Fix: 

See above in Description.
How-To-Repeat: 
Intall the most recent netscape4-communicator.
Got mine via CTM this morning.
